phpChanges: Moved modal div from after </section> to inside <section> (before the closing </section> tag)

Changed inner wrapper from 'relative w-full max-w-4xl mx-4 scale-95 transition-transform duration-300' to 'testimonial-modal-content w-full max-w-4xl mx-4 overflow-y-auto max-h-full py-8 scale-95 transition-transform duration-300'
Removed absolute positioning from close button: removed 'absolute -top-12 right-0 md:-top-14 z-10' classes

Wrapped close button in a flex container: '
...
' for right-alignment in normal flow
Added 'testimonial-modal-content' class to inner wrapper for JS targeting
Added 'overflow-y-auto max-h-full py-8' to inner wrapper for scrollability
jsChanges: Replaced single global modal query with module-level 'let currentModal = null' variable
Removed single videoContainer and closeBtn queries (lines 44-46)
Modified openModal to accept modal as first parameter: openModal(modal, videoSource, videoUrl, testimonialName)
openModal now queries videoContainer and closeBtn within the passed modal element
openModal sets currentModal = modal at the start
closeModal now operates on currentModal instead of a single global modal
closeModal sets currentModal = null after closing
Changed video button click handler to find modal via btn.closest('section.testimonials-carousel').querySelector('.testimonial-video-modal')
Changed close button binding to use event delegation: document.addEventListener('click', ...) with e.target.closest('.testimonial-video-close')
Changed click-outside handler to check currentModal instead of a single modal reference
Changed Escape key handler to check 'currentModal !== null' instead of modal classes
Changed focus trap to scope to currentModal instead of single modal
Updated scale transition selectors from '.relative' to '.testimonial-modal-content'
Fixed optional chaining assignment syntax (videoContainer?.textContent = '') to if statement for Babel compatibility

syncStatus.notes: PHP and JS changes are properly coordinated. The modal HTML structure in PHP now includes the testimonial-modal-content class that JS targets for scale transitions. Each section has its own modal instance.

lintWarnings: Usage of __experimentalToggleGroupControl from @wordpress/components (pre-existing, not related to changes)
Usage of __experimentalToggleGroupControlOption from @wordpress/components (pre-existing, not related to changes)

implementationNotes: Each TestimonialsCarousel block instance now has its own modal element inside the <section>
The static guard that prevented multiple modals has been removed
The close button is now in normal document flow, right-aligned above the video area using flexbox
The modal content area is scrollable when viewport height is too short (overflow-y-auto, max-h-full, py-8)
JS tracks the currently open modal via module-level currentModal variable
All event handlers (escape, click-outside, focus-trap) now reference currentModal instead of a single global modal
Scale transitions work correctly with the new .testimonial-modal-content selector
Optional chaining assignment was replaced with explicit null check for Babel compatibility
qaChecklist: Video modal opens when clicking 'Watch the Video' button on any testimonial card
Modal opens within the correct section (inspect DOM to verify modal is inside <section>)
Close button appears right-aligned above the video, in normal document flow (not overlapping video)
Close button click closes the modal
Clicking outside the video area (on the dark overlay) closes the modal
Body scroll is locked when modal is open
Body scroll is restored when modal is closed
Focus moves to close button when modal opens
Focus returns to the video button when modal closes
Focus trap works (Tab cycles within modal)
Modal is scrollable when viewport height is too short for the video content
Multiple TestimonialsCarousel blocks on the same page each have their own modal and work independently
YouTube embed videos load and play correctly in modal
File-based videos load and play correctly in modal
Video content is cleared after modal close transition completes
Scale transition (scale-95 -> scale-100) still works on open/close
